risk_if_not_implemented: Without Dual Authorization for Sensitive Data Destruction, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Physical Media Disposal
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to securely dispose of media when it is no longer required, using formal procedures.
compensating_control_1.justification: Physical Media Disposal (DCH-08) provides physical access control that compensates for the absence of Dual Authorization for Sensitive Data Destruction (DCH-09.5) by preventing unauthorized physical interaction with systems and infrastructure. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Secure Disposal, Destruction or Re-Use of Equipment
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to securely dispose of, destroy or repurpose system components using organization-defined techniques and methods to prevent information being recovered from these components.
compensating_control_2.justification: Secure Disposal, Destruction or Re-Use of Equipment (AST-09) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Dual Authorization for Sensitive Data Destruction (DCH-09.5) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
